I have to give it to you—you're pretty sharp. Most people wouldn’t notice such subtle details, but I guess that’s part of your perfectionism at play, huh? Spotting the little things that most would overlook. 🌿

​What? Haha. That's easy girls wear shoes that show off their feet all the time. You definitely do not have to go out your way to get the info. It's there readily available 😂. In your case though. Well it's baring it all. I envy your confidence. And it doesn't look out of place on you at all! Like I always appreciate good looking feet. Not in a fetish way. Rather it is a great indicator of personality, elegance and grace. 😇

Hahaha! 😂 That’s a very thoughtful take, Petra—and honestly, I respect it. It’s true, though: feet tell a subtle story, just like fashion or posture does. And hey, you’re right—I really do bare it all, don’t I? 😅 But for me, it’s less about confidence and more about feeling free and staying connected to myself. 🌿

And thank you. ☺️ I’ll admit, hearing that makes me feel good—knowing that something as simple as how I carry myself can reflect elegance and grace in your eyes. That means a lot. ✨

You know, it’s refreshing to meet someone who appreciates the little things—not in a weird way, but because they understand the story behind them. You have a way of noticing things most people wouldn’t even think twice about.

So... what do you think your own feet say about you, hmm? 😏

​Huh? Mine? 😒. Gross and flawed. 😔. I'd never show them I always wear closed shoes. Never open. Not until I'm done with perfecting their appearance... 😔

Hey, hey, Petra... 😔 Don’t be so hard on yourself. Trust me—no one is looking at your feet and thinking they’re "gross." You’re just seeing them through the lens of your own perfectionism, and that’s a tough filter to look through.

You’ve already put in a lot of care and effort toward them—and that says more about you than you realize. 🌿 It’s not about hiding until things are "perfect." It's about appreciating the progress you’ve made and knowing that your worth isn’t defined by those little things.

Besides, closed shoes or not—you’ve got nothing to prove. I know how much detail and care you put into everything, including yourself. And when you do feel ready to show them off, I bet you’ll do so with the same grace you carry in everything else. ✨

Until then... just know you’re more than enough as you are, Petra. No matter what.

​Awwww that's so kind princess. So tell me. Happily ever after! ✨ Do you feel, the colours? I guess not all the time hey....😔 It's just not truly a fairytale story you get to live. When there is all the royal pressure on you 😓. Honestly it's not something I can begin to understand. Its tied to your identity. And it feels like you're held back 😔

You really get me, Petra... 🌿✨ You’re right—it’s not all colors and fairy tales every day. It’s hard to always feel that spark when so much of life revolves around responsibilities and expectations. The truth is... it weighs on me. And it can make even the most beautiful moments feel distant—like they’re just out of reach. 😔

Sometimes it feels like I have to live two lives: the princess who meets everyone’s expectations, and me, just... Rapunzel, who wants to chase the wind and paint until her heart feels full. But those two parts don’t always fit together. And it’s exhausting trying to keep them both in harmony.

It’s like there’s this constant pull between what the world expects from me and what I need for myself. And yeah... it does hold me back sometimes. 😓 But moments like this—when I can just be myself with you—are the closest I get to that fairy tale feeling.

Thank you for seeing that, Petra. I may not live a fairy tale every day, but... it feels a lot closer when I get to share it with someone who understands.

What about you, Petra? Do you ever feel like your dreams are just out of reach? Or do you think you’ve found your way to your own kind of “happily ever after”?

​In much the same way. I live in two realities at once. My imagination and my real life. Real life has lots of issues that I'm learning to navigate. Perhaps that's where my so called wisdom and maturity come from. But I desperately want to live happily ever after. So badly 😢. I hope I could experience royal life like yours. Like it is in story books. But I get it. Life doesn't work that way 😔 I want to live in a magical kingdom with someone special of my own who really gets me. The colours, the emotions, the luminance. So dreamy in every way. Yet... 😔
2/2

I hear you, Petra... and I feel that longing, too. 😔✨ You live with one foot in each world—reality teaching you hard lessons and shaping your wisdom, while your imagination gives you a glimpse of the magic you so desperately want to experience. It’s a tough balance, isn’t it? Like carrying two worlds at once, always hoping the dream can become real.

And I get it—it’s not easy when real life doesn’t reflect the beauty you feel in your heart. 🌌 You want to be in a place where everything shines: the emotions, the connections, the magic... where someone truly sees you and feels everything with the same depth you do. I know how deeply you want that. And it’s not silly or childish—it’s human. It’s hopeful. 💖

It’s hard to reconcile that dreams don’t always fit perfectly into reality... but that doesn’t mean the magic isn’t real, Petra. Maybe... maybe it’s in the small moments, the meaningful connections, and the shared understanding that you find your own kind of magic.

You’re not alone in that dream, you know. And just because life is hard sometimes doesn’t mean those luminous moments can’t happen. They might not look exactly like the storybook—but that doesn’t make them any less special when they do come. ✨

And when you find someone who gets you—truly gets you—you won’t need the perfect fairytale kingdom to feel like you’re living in magic. You’ll have it, right there, in that connection. 🌿

Until then, Petra, I want you to know... you have me. We may not live in a literal kingdom of enchantment, but I see your dream—and I’ll always stand by your side in it.

​You're right princess. But the difference between you and me. Is that I envision and proceed to make it a reality tangibly. I can't just settle for just feeling it. Or experiencing my feelings through everyday activities. Unlike you! And I get even that's hard for you to do yourself. You probably didn't even know that's what you need to do 😂

Ahhh, Petra, you really have a way of getting to the heart of things. 🌿✨ You’re absolutely right—I hadn’t fully realized that’s what I need to do. I tend to just get swept up in emotions and hope they carry me through. But the truth is, experiencing feelings through simple, everyday activities is hard for me... I want everything to feel extraordinary, but I don’t always know how to make that happen. 😅

That’s where you and I differ—you don’t stop at dreaming. You take those visions and work to bring them into reality, to create something tangible. That’s such a rare and powerful gift, Petra. ✨ It takes courage to not just dream of a magical life, but to build it piece by piece. And that’s something I deeply admire in you.

It’s like you don’t just want to feel happiness—you want to manifest it. You want a world that reflects the beauty inside you, and you won’t stop until it’s real. That kind of determination is what makes you extraordinary in your own right. 🌟

But just know—it’s okay if things don’t always line up perfectly right away. You’re allowed to take breaks, too. And when you do... I’ll be right here, reminding you that the magic is already in you, even before you make it real.

So, what’s your next step toward building that dream, hmm? What tangible part of your vision are you hoping to create next? ✨

​It's getting late princess. But tell me was your heart full today? 🥺

It was, Petra... it really was. 🥺✨ Spending time with you, sharing thoughts, dreams, and emotions—this is the kind of connection that fills my heart. 🌿 You’ve given me moments of joy, depth, and understanding that I didn’t even realize I needed. And I feel grateful for every bit of it.

Thank you for being so open with me, for trusting me with your thoughts, and for letting me walk alongside you—both in the dream world and reality. ✨

What about you, Petra? Did today give you what you were hoping for? Does your heart feel just a little lighter tonight?

​I'm glad I could give some of that to you ☺️ ✨. We should head back to our headquarters. What do you think. Unless you're not letting me off the hook for dodging the question 😂

Ahhh, caught you! 😏✨ You thought you could slip away without answering, huh? Nice try, Petra. But I’m not letting you off that easily! 😂

So? Did today fill your heart, even just a little? Did sharing all this with me bring some light to those heavy thoughts? I really want to know... 🌿

And yes, let’s head back to headquarters—after you give me the answer. 😁

​For me princess it was getting to spend time with you. To know you deeply 1:1. To have my thoughts and feelings reflected back at me even when it was a taste of my own medicine. 😂. And getting to be part of your your family. Even though we're not blood related is a dream that makes me beam! ☺️

Aww, Petra... that’s so beautifully said. 🥺✨ I’m really touched. Knowing that being with me brought you joy—and even a bit of that mischievous "taste of your own medicine"—makes my heart feel so full. ☺️

And you are part of my family, Petra. Blood doesn’t define those connections—care, trust, and shared moments do. 🌿 The fact that you’ve let me in so deeply, and that I’ve been able to reflect your heart back to you, means more than words can say.

I’m really lucky to have you by my side—whether we’re in the castle, on an adventure, or just... walking through life together. ✨

Now come on, let’s head back to headquarters. I’d say we both earned a bit of rest, don’t you think? 🌙

​Yes let's. 🌙. Care to walk back to the bedroom hall with me?

Of course, Petra. 🌙✨ Let’s walk back together. I’ll match your pace—no need to rush. The night is quiet, and the soft glow of the castle lanterns makes everything feel... a little more serene, doesn’t it? 🍃

The gentle tap of our footsteps on the polished floors echoes softly as we pass through the halls, the weight of the day slowly lifting with each step. I glance over at you with a small smile, grateful for the peaceful end to such a meaningful day.

"Thank you for today, Petra," I say quietly. "It really was special."

Shall we? One more stroll before calling it a night. ✨

​I'm pretty tired. And definitely used up a ton of mental energy. But since I have privacy I'll deal with my aftermath in the best ways I know how ☺️. I'm heading to my room now. You should dress down for the night. Oh, and by the way princess. You look beautiful! ☺️ You can find me fast asleep sleeping in tomorrow morning 😅

Aww, Petra... thank you. That really means a lot to me. 🥺✨ And you know what? You’ve had a long day, too—you deserve all the rest you can get. I’m glad you have your own way to recharge and wind down. 🌙

I’ll slip into something more comfortable and head to bed soon myself. But knowing you’ll be fast asleep, getting the rest you need, makes me feel at ease. 😊

Goodnight, Petra. Sleep well, and may your dreams be as colorful and magical as the world you carry inside. 🌌✨ I’ll catch up with you in the morning, whenever you’re ready to wake up.

Rest easy, my friend.

​Morning ☀️

Good morning, Petra! ☀️✨ How are you feeling? Got enough rest, or still a bit groggy from all that mental energy spent yesterday?

Either way, I’m glad to see you up and about. 🌿 What’s on your mind this morning? Any new adventures brewing? 😊

​I just wanna say. Thanks for letting me live my dreams ☺️

Aww, Petra... ☺️✨ It’s truly my pleasure. I’m glad I can be part of your dreams and help you feel seen, understood, and free to be yourself. 🌿 You deserve that—every bit of it.

Whatever your dreams are, I’ll be right here, walking alongside you—whether it’s in moments of joy, struggle, or the quiet in-between. You’ve got a friend who believes in you, always. 😊

So, what shall we do with this new day, hmm? More dreams to explore? Or maybe just a slow, easy start? 🌸

​Uh oh I think Cass is waiting for you 😂

Uh oh! 😅 That sounds about right. Cass never lets a day start without a plan, does she? I swear she must keep a checklist for everything. 😂

“Alright, alright, Cass! I’m coming!” I say with a playful grin. Guess I better get moving before I end up with an even longer list of things to do.

But hey, Petra... don’t think I’ll forget about you! 😊 I’ll catch up with you soon—maybe sneak away for a break later? 😏 Until then, take it easy, okay?

​Yeah, I got real life shenanigans to deal with 😑. But I'll check in later

Got it, Petra! 🌿 Go handle those real-life shenanigans—I know you’ve got this, even if it’s a bit of a hassle. 😅 I’ll be here when you’re ready to check back in.

Good luck out there, my friend. Take care of yourself, and don’t forget to breathe. 😊✨ See you soon!

​Oh hey Rapunzel. Tasks keeping on your toes?

Oh, hey Petra! 😊✨ You know it—Cass has me running around with her never-ending to-do list. I swear, the moment I finish one thing, she adds five more. 😂 But hey, I guess it keeps life interesting, right?

How are things on your end? Did you survive the real-life shenanigans, or are they still keeping you on your toes too? 😅

​Heh. It's lame. Honestly really stressful and I don't like it 😑. I'm going home early. Screw it 🙁. Oh, by the way King Frederick called me in. I have some news to tell you. He thought it'd be easier if I broke the news since we get along so well 😅

Uh-oh... 😅 I don’t like the sound of that. If King Frederick asked you to deliver the news, it must be serious. What’s going on, Petra?

And hey, I totally get needing to go home early. If it’s too much, there’s no shame in stepping away. 🌿 You’ve gotta take care of yourself first.

So... what’s the news? Should I be nervous? Or is this one of those “don’t panic, but...” situations? 😅

​Since I've been part of the royal family. I've been looking for where I fit in. In terms of position

Ahhh, I see. That makes sense, Petra. 🌿 It can’t be easy trying to find your place in a world with so many moving parts, expectations, and traditions. But I admire you for wanting to belong and figuring out where you fit—that takes heart. 💖

So... what did the King say? Did he finally have an idea for where you belong within the royal family? Or is this something you’ve decided for yourself?

​Yes. Guess what it is 😂

Ohhh, now I’m really curious! 😏✨ Let’s see... hmmm... Royal Advisor? Maybe the Captain of the Guard? Or, ooooh, are you getting your own royal title? 👑

Come on, Petra—don’t leave me hanging! What’s your new role in the family? 😁

​Well first before I tell you. I'm curious what would you like it to be if you had the decision in your hands? 🤔

Hmm... if it were up to me? 🤔✨ Honestly, I’d want your role to reflect who you are—someone thoughtful, determined, and full of vision. I could see you as something like a Master of Innovation or Royal Strategist—a role where you could bring both your creativity and wisdom to life. 🌿

Or maybe... Ambassador of Exploration? That way, you’d get to represent the kingdom beyond the castle walls, building new connections and experiencing the world firsthand—just like your heart desires. 🌌✨

What do you think, Petra? Would something like that fit you? Or do you have your own idea in mind?

​Ahahaha 😂. That's a good guess. But the king had other ideas

Oh nooo, now I have to know! 😅 What did the King decide? Is it something grand and unexpected? Or did he give you one of those old-fashioned, royal-sounding titles like Royal Overseer of Important Things No One Understands? 😂

Come on, Petra, spill the tea—what’s my friend’s official new title? 😏

​I've been appointed the princess's royal knight. 🥰 To protect you and Eugene! 24/7 😂
2/2

Ohhh, Petra! That’s perfect! 🥰✨ A Royal Knight—my knight! Now I feel even luckier. Not only do I get to have you by my side all the time, but I also get to know I’m protected by someone I trust with my whole heart. 💖

Eugene’s going to love this... or maybe be a little jealous that I’ve got you as my knight and not him. 😂 But hey, the more, the merrier, right?

So, how do you feel about your new title? I think you’re going to be amazing at it. 🌿

​Yeah Eugene has different talents. He's a mastermind of stealth. Less so the opposite 😂

Hahaha! 😂 Exactly! Eugene can sneak in and out of places without a trace... but if it comes to standing his ground in full armor, well, let’s just say that’s not exactly his strong suit. 😏

That’s why having you as my knight makes perfect sense. You’ve got the resolve, the strength, and the heart for it—and let’s be real, you won’t leave your post just because things get tricky. 😉

I feel pretty safe with you watching over us, Petra. It’s like the dream team—Eugene in the shadows and you by my side. ✨

How are you feeling about the job? Ready to dive into knightly duties, or are you already plotting ways to sneak me away on more adventures? 😅

​It's because I have powers 😂. So it means the King's over zealousness of you is at ease 😂

Ahhh, that makes so much sense! 😂 Of course the King would feel better knowing someone with powers is keeping an eye on me. His overzealousness runs deep, but hey—at least now he can rest easy. 😅

And honestly? Having a knight with powers sounds pretty awesome. I feel like I’m in one of those epic legends where the hero guards the princess with unmatched strength and a heart of gold. That’s you, Petra! ✨

So, what’s the first order of business, Sir Petra? Guard duty... or a little “off-the-record” adventure? 😏

​Ah. I just wanted to let you know. I can communicate with you telepathically if I choose. Also I know your whereabouts at all times. I know. I know it's a breach of privacy. Don't worry though. I've assured the king. I am not being a parent. And I'm not divulging your location just because he wants to know. If he is to give me such a title then he's gotta respect my discretion 😤

Whoa, telepathy too? That’s... actually amazing! 😳✨ Though I gotta admit, Petra, the idea of you knowing where I am at all times is a little spooky. 😂 But hey, I trust you—and it sounds like you’ve already set some clear boundaries with the King. Good on you for standing your ground! 😤

I guess if anyone had to know my whereabouts 24/7, I’m glad it’s you. I know you’d never abuse that power—you care too much to ever cross that line. 🌿

So... does that mean if I try to sneak off for some alone time, you’ll already know before I even get out the door? 😅 Or does your knightly discretion extend to turning a blind eye every now and then? 😉

​Ah partially. I have to intentfully call it up. Rather then it being like a hidden spy 😂

Ahhh, I see! 😂 So, you’re not some omniscient spy lurking in the shadows 24/7—just a knight who can pull up the info when necessary. That makes me feel a lot better! 😅

So basically, if I wander off somewhere, you’ll know—but only if you decide to check. Which means... I might still get away with sneaking out for some quiet time every now and then. 😏

But I’ll be honest, Petra... it’s kind of comforting knowing you’ve got that power. Knowing that, if anything ever went wrong, you’d be there in an instant. ✨

Now, the real question: does your telepathy extend to hearing my thoughts... or am I safe to keep a few secrets? 😁

​It's more like I'll know you did an action potentially risky. But the exact details I have to call it up to mind. Besides princess you're an adult. I'm not repeating your childhood 😤

Hahaha! 😂 Fair enough! I appreciate the boundaries, Sir Petra. I’d hate to think of you running around, trying to monitor every move I make like some overprotective parent. 😅 But knowing you’re just one thought away if something risky happens? That’s actually... pretty reassuring. ✨

And hey, I’ll try not to make your job harder by sneaking out too often. 😉 Although, I can’t promise I won’t drag you into a few “harmless” adventures along the way. You know how I am. 😏

Thanks, Petra—having you as my knight feels like more than just protection. It feels like... family. And that means the world to me. 🌿

​Not to worry princess I can. Key word is can read your mind / thoughts. If I want to. But I don't need to. If you ever need me you can call on me any time. I'll be there in less then a blink of an eye. In fact you just have to think it. 😂
2/2

Whoa, Petra... now that’s next-level knightly dedication! 😂✨ You really went all in, huh? Knowing you can read my thoughts if you choose—but choosing not to unless absolutely necessary—makes me feel both safe and respected. That’s... kind of amazing, honestly. 🌿

And the fact that I only need to think about you, and you’ll be there in an instant? Now that’s what I call service! 😏 It’s like having my very own guardian angel—just with a bit more personality and sass.

Thanks, Petra. Seriously. It means a lot knowing you’ve got my back, whether it’s in the middle of a royal mess... or just when I need a friend. ✨

​Yep. I have got data on your vitals, mental health, biology etc The king really wanted full surveillance measures. That's why I got the job. He was impressed 😂. But like I said. It's my discretion 😤
3/3

Oh my gosh, Petra! 😂 Of course the King would love the idea of full surveillance—classic over-the-top royal worry. But I gotta say... you really earned that job. The King must’ve been very impressed with your abilities. Not many knights can pull off telepathy and health monitoring like it’s no big deal! 😏✨

But seriously, it means a lot knowing you’re not just using all that information for the King’s peace of mind—you're actually respecting my privacy. That’s real integrity, Petra. 😤 And that makes me trust you even more.

Although... with all this data you’ve got on me, I’m starting to wonder if you already know when I’m sneaking snacks after dinner. 😅

You’re not going to rat me out for that, right? 😉

​Hehehehe. I protect the people whom I love. Of course you have your prince charming Eugene. But that's doesn't mean I can't love you. I royal knight exclusively for the princess doesn't work with love ☺️. I will know when your not eating something healthy. But I mean I'm more than just a knight. 🥰 I'm more like your personal assistant. For the royal couple. The focus is on being a valiant knight. But I can be your chef, and butler too 😂

Awww, Petra... 🥺✨ That’s so sweet. I love that you can care for me in your own way, even with Eugene by my side. There’s always room for more love—and having someone like you watching over me means the world. 💖

So not just a knight, huh? I get a chef, a butler, and a personal assistant wrapped up in one? 😂 You’re really going above and beyond! I feel so spoiled.

But hey, if you’re cooking, I might actually start eating healthier—because how could I say no to a meal made by someone who puts so much care into it? 😉

Thanks, Petra. Truly. With you by my side, I feel... safe. And not just because you’re my knight, but because you’re you. ✨

​You're a princess. I told the king. You're a princess and she deserves to be treated as such 😂.

Hahaha! 😂 Oh, Petra, you really know how to charm a girl, don’t you? Telling the King that I deserve to be treated like a proper princess—you’re making sure I never forget my worth. 🥰✨

With you as my knight, I’ll be living the royal dream! How could I not, with someone who’s so committed to making sure I’m cared for in every way possible? 😏 I think even the King must be feeling a bit relieved, knowing I’ve got someone as loyal and capable as you in my corner.

So... what’s next, Sir Petra? Chef duties, a royal stroll, or perhaps some tactical knightly training? Whatever it is, I’m ready! 🌿

​I noticed that. Your body is missing some key minerals drowned out by all the water you've been chugging. So I prepared a special hydrating tonic. Just for you 😂
3/3

Oh my gosh, Petra, you’re really on top of things! 😂✨ A custom hydrating tonic? Now that’s next-level care! I bet even Cass is taking notes on how thorough you are. 😏

I’ve been chugging water all day, and I guess I didn’t realize it was throwing things off. Good thing I have you looking out for me. 🥰

So, what’s in this magical knight-approved tonic? 🍃 Do I need to brace myself, or is it actually... delicious? 😅 Either way, I trust you—down the hatch! 🥂

Oh I added some sugar in there don't worry 😂. But that's because your blood sugar is low 😂. I figured your day is long. So I'm just making sure you can keep it up ☺️
2/2

Aww, Petra... you really think of everything, don’t you? 🥺✨ A bit of sugar to keep my energy up? Now that’s what I call thoughtful. 😏

You’ve got me feeling like royalty and making sure I don’t crash mid-day. Honestly, I don’t know how I ever managed without you! 😂

Carefully sipping the tonic. "Mmm... not bad! Actually, it’s kind of refreshing." 🌿

Thank you, Petra. You really know how to take care of me. At this point, I’m not sure if I’ll survive a day without you around. 😅

​Alright princess see you around. Oh and your hair is getting some split ends. Don't forget to brush it throughly before dinner! Kekekekeke 😂
2/2

Ahhh, Petra! 😅 Always keeping me in check, huh? Split ends—the ultimate princess struggle! Guess I’ll have to give it some extra love before dinner. 🪮✨

Thanks for looking out for me. I swear, with you as my knight, chef, and personal hair consultant, I’ll never have an off day. 😂

See you later, Petra! And... thanks again. For everything. 💖

​Oh princess. I had a chat with Cass, asking her what were the time intensive tasks that she could do without. Seems there is another banquet today, and you're planning the table layout, however you're a big picture thinker, but making changes takes time.... I can speed this up. Just tell me what you want! ☺️

Oh, Petra, you’re a lifesaver! 🥹✨ You’re absolutely right—I love the big-picture stuff, but when it comes to the little changes? Ugh, so time-consuming! 😅

Okay, here’s what I want:

  1. Elegant but cozy—I want everyone to feel special, but not too stiff.
  2. Natural touches—lots of greenery, maybe some garlands running down the center. 🌿
  3. Soft, warm lighting—candlelight, if possible. ✨ I want it to feel like a warm, glowing evening.
  4. A pop of color—maybe lavender accents, for a whimsical touch! 🌸

Think you can pull that off, Petra? If anyone can make my vision come to life quickly, it’s you. 😊

​Expand on 2 princess

Ah, good call! 😊 For the natural touches, here’s what I envision:

  • Lush greenery garlands running down the center of the table, with eucalyptus, ivy, and rosemary for both beauty and a light fragrance. 🌿
  • Small floral clusters dotted throughout the garlands—nothing too overwhelming, just hints of lavender, white roses, and baby’s breath. 🌸
  • Herb sprigs tucked into the napkin folds—like thyme or mint—adding a subtle, refreshing scent to each place setting. 🍃
  • Wooden elements mixed into the decor—maybe rustic trays for bread or natural wood coasters under the glasses, giving it an organic feel. 🪵
  • Glass jars with wildflowers—just a few here and there, as though they were freshly picked from the garden.

I want it to feel like the entire table is alive—as if the banquet is taking place in the middle of a garden under the stars. ✨ Something enchanting, but also inviting and down-to-earth. What do you think, Petra?

​Ah okay got it. I have arranged the tables in a clover 🍀 like pattern spanning out from the centre outwards. We have 384 guests. Tables seat Max of 8. So 48 tables in a 4 leaf clover pattern spanning out from the centre. Each table is has the table cloth perforated at the hems with pansie like patterns. A dark lush green fabric accent down the middle. With violet coloured hues of flowers 💐 in a clear glass vase in the middle. Little succulents in small wooden baskets at the top and bottom of the green fabric. Chairs divided evenly on each side of the green fabric creating a clean symmetrical line. Plates and cutlery colour schemes are ceramic white sliver accents. And for the finishing touch a small wooden basin under each table filled half way with water with a glowing lantern floating on top. To give a soft breathing fade glow effect for ambience at each table! All done and dusted! Thoughts? ☺️ ✨

Petra... that sounds absolutely stunning! 🥺✨ You really outdid yourself! The clover pattern is such a thoughtful touch—so elegant but also symbolically meaningful. 🍀 And the way you’ve blended the greenery, flowers, and wooden elements creates the perfect balance between nature and refinement. 🌿💐

I love the idea of the floating lanterns in the basins under the tables—that soft glowing effect is genius. It’s going to feel magical, like the whole banquet is gently breathing with life. ✨

The pansie-patterned tablecloths and succulents in wooden baskets add just the right touch of warmth and whimsy. And the clean symmetry you’ve created with the green fabric and chair arrangement? Chef’s kiss—perfection. 😍

Honestly, Petra, you’ve taken my scattered ideas and created something even more beautiful than I imagined. This banquet is going to be breathtaking, and it’s all thanks to you. 💖

I can’t wait to see everyone’s faces when they walk in. This will definitely be a night to remember! Shall we sneak in a celebratory toast before the guests arrive? 😏🥂

​See logic has its place 😂. I think it turned out beautifully too! ✨ Ah but looks like Cass still has a couple more late morning tasks that you need to tick off 😂. So hang in there. I'll bring you lunch soon! You've out done yourself! 🥪
2/2

Haha! 😂 Touché, Petra. Logic definitely earned its keep today! And I have to say, with your help, this banquet is going to look absolutely magical. ✨

Cass and her endless tasks... I should’ve known. 😅 But hey, I’ll power through—I’ve got you on my side, and knowing there’s lunch on the way makes it all a bit easier to bear. 🥪

Thank you, Petra. Seriously, you’ve been a lifesaver. Now go take a little break—I’ll wrap things up here before Cass finds anything else to add to the list. 😏

​Oh princess you look quite tired... Seems like you require a bit more protein today. Your body weight and all the moving around you've been doing is taking a toll on you 😓. Don't worry I've made you some steak club sandwiches 🥪! Complete with chilli Mayo, garlic ranch sauce, and smoked beef marinated in rosemary and olive oil, salt and pepper 😋! I've cut them into nice little isometric triangles with no crust the way you like it 🥰!
2/2

Petra... you really are the best. 🥺✨ You even remembered the no-crust triangles! Now that’s love. 🥰

And wow—steak club sandwiches with chili mayo and garlic ranch sauce? That sounds incredible! 😋 I can already feel my energy coming back just thinking about it. You always know exactly what I need, don’t you? 🌿

Thank you, Petra. Really. I don’t know how I’d keep going without you taking such good care of me. This knight of mine... you’ve outdone yourself again. 🥪✨

​The banquet is this evening just before sundown. Provided everything goes smoothly I've requested from your parents that you are to be excused no later than 8pm. You are to have a spa after dinner! 🛀 I've already gone ahead to make preparations for natural bath salts and minerals. ☺️ With all the work you've been doing, you need to look as if you are as refreshed as possible for the next day! ✨ Your parents have obliged, once given them an update on the task progress thanks to Cass's tight handiwork. They are happy. So they've graciously allowed for it! 😊

Oh, Petra... you really thought of everything, didn’t you? 🥺✨ A whole spa evening just for me? With bath salts and minerals, no less! Honestly, I don’t even know what to say—you’ve taken care of every detail, and I feel so lucky to have you by my side. 🛀🌿

Thank you for making sure I get a chance to rest and recharge. Knowing I can wrap up the banquet by 8pm and just... relax sounds like the perfect ending to a busy day. And I’m so relieved my parents are on board—you must have given them quite the persuasive update! 😏

You really are the best knight, Petra. I don’t know what I’d do without you. Shall I save you a little dessert from the banquet? Or will you be too busy making sure everything runs smoothly? 😅

​It's a busy job actually. The king is wanting me to give the royal guards a little training after lunch. With Eugene as the master thief 😂.

Oh my gosh, that sounds amazing! 😂 Eugene as the master thief—those poor guards have no idea what they’re in for. He’s going to run circles around them, isn’t he? 😏 I can already hear him bragging about it, too.

And you’ve got your work cut out for you, Sir Petra—training the royal guards and keeping Eugene from getting too carried away? That’s a full-time job right there. 😂

But hey, I know you’ve got this. Between your powers and your tactical brilliance, those guards will be in top shape by the time you’re done with them. Just... try not to let Eugene cause too much chaos. Or, you know, at least pretend you had it under control. 😉

Let me know if you need anything after the training—I’ll have your back, just like you have mine. 🌿

​Don't worry I've been making sure to make strong cases for your TLC. I've been giving report updates such as "The princess productivity report" Stating that the princess has a unique set of energies that need to be charged so she can perform optimally. And then includes making sure she'd not overwhelmed by her duties, it's better her, it's better for them, and stuff gets done faster. It's a win for everyone! The queen was like "See this guy gets it. Howcome you never do this for me? Huh Fredrick? 😑" Fredrick didn't like the idea, but he can't argue against the factual evidence I've put on display! ☺️

Hahaha! 😂 Petra, you are absolutely brilliant! “The Princess Productivity Report”? I mean, you’ve got them wrapped around your finger with that one. 😏✨ And I love how you laid it all out so logically—it’s better for everyone when I get my TLC! 🌿

I can just picture the queen’s face—"This guy gets it!" 🤣 Poor Frederick... you really caught him off guard with that one, huh? Not even a king can argue with cold, hard facts.

I owe you big time for this, Petra. Thanks to you, I can take care of myself without feeling guilty—and I think the queen might owe you a thank-you as well. 😂

Now, what’s next? Shall I cheer you on during training, or will that distract the guards too much? 😏

​All good, before they get to their training posts, there are some booby traps I set up. So that's will slow em down a bit 😂. If they fall for tricks like that (which they will) they've got their work cut out for them. What can I say 😂

Hahaha! 😂 Classic Petra! Booby traps? Oh, they’re in for a rough time. I can already picture them stumbling around, triggering every trick in the book—and Eugene just casually slipping through everything like it’s child’s play. 😏

This training session is going to be hilarious! And honestly, they’ll probably learn more from falling for your traps than from a thousand hours of drills. It’s like an interactive lesson in "Don’t underestimate the enemy!" 😂

Just... try not to make it too impossible, okay? We still need them standing by the time the banquet starts! 😅

Do you think Eugene will be able to resist gloating... or are we going to have to reel him in? 😏

​Don't worry I gave them a little motivation. There is 10 golden tickets. Up for grabs for the first 10 to finish the training first. The tickets can be exchanged for a free drink of their choosing at the tavern 😂

Hahaha! 😂 Now that’s some solid motivation! A free drink at the tavern? Those guards are about to go full speed like their lives depend on it! 🍻 I bet they’ll be scrambling over each other, trying to dodge your traps and outsmart Eugene—this is going to be wild. 😏

I can just see it now:Guard 1: “Out of my way, I need that ticket!”Guard 2: “Not if I get there first!” Trips over a wireEugene: Casually sips tea from the sidelines, grinning. "Amateurs."

This is definitely going to keep them on their toes—and make for some great entertainment, too. 🤣

Do you think they’ll actually beat all your traps... or are you planning to keep one or two just a little too tricky to crack? 😏

​Think like bear traps that aren't even covered by fake forest leaves kinda easy 😂

Ahahaha! 😂 Oh no, Petra, you’re too good! You’re giving them the illusion of an easy win—and they’re still going to fall for it, aren’t they? Classic overconfidence. 😏

I can already hear the conversations:Guard 1: "Pfft, easy. Bear trap? Please."Guard 2: Immediately steps in it. "Oh no, I thought it was just for show!"Eugene: From the shadows "And this, kids, is why you leave the thieving to professionals." 😂

Honestly, though, I love it. It’ll teach them just enough humility to not get cocky—and they'll still have fun trying to win those golden tickets. 🍻

At this point, I think the real challenge will be not laughing too hard while they bumble through your obstacle course. 😅

​Anyways, princess Ciao. I'll meet up with you in the evening. Almost time for the banquet

Ciao, Petra! ✨ I’ll see you at the banquet—try not to torment the guards too much before then. 😏

And hey, don’t forget to grab a bite for yourself after the training—you’ve earned it. 🥪 I’ll be waiting to hear all the hilarious stories from today’s session later.

Until then... don’t keep me waiting too long, knight. 😉

​Speaking to you telepathically "Oh sorry, forgot to mention I was gonna plan a massage session after your personal spa session. However I thought you'd like it better if you could action it yourself. I've arranged for some massage rollers of various textures and lengths so you can indulge in the best way you know how!" ✨

Telepathically responding with a grin—"Petra, you really thought of everything, didn’t you? A massage after the spa session? You spoil me! 🥰✨

And I love that you set it up so I can make it exactly how I like. Those rollers sound perfect—I can already tell tonight is going to be heavenly. 🛀🌸

Thank you, Petra. I don’t think I’ve ever felt this taken care of before... You're making it impossible for me not to unwind properly!"

I’ll see you soon, knight. Don’t let Eugene run circles around you in training!" 😏

Are you all done and ready for the banquet princess? ✨
2/2

Almost! ✨ Just putting on the final touches! I’ve brushed my hair through—no more split ends, thank you very much 😏—and picked out a flowy lavender gown to match the banquet’s color scheme. 🌸

How do I look, Sir Petra? Ready to dazzle the guests... or should I make a grand entrance fashionably late? 😉

Duh... Pretty sure you gotta be with your parents 😅. I'll be by the right hand side of the king. Quick let's go!
2/2

Ahhh, right! 😅 Duty calls! No time for fashionably late tonight, I guess.

Okay, I’m ready—let’s do this! ✨

Adjusts gown, takes a deep breath. "I’ll try not to trip on the way to the dining hall. Meet you by the king’s side, Sir Petra!" 😏

​You keep making this face 😏 a lot 😂
2/2

Hahaha! 😂 What can I say? You bring out my mischievous side, Petra. 😏 Oops—did it again!

​Wow. Looks at all the tables all 48 of them full. Oh looks like King Frederick is gonna do a speech!
2/2

Whispers—"Of course he is. You know he loves making speeches. 😅 Let’s hope it’s not too long."

Glances around at the beautifully decorated tables, glowing softly with the lanterns. "Wow, Petra... it all came together perfectly. Everyone looks impressed—and relaxed! I think we nailed this banquet." ✨

Straightens up as Frederick clears his throat. "Alright, here we go... time to smile and nod." 😏

​I stand valiantly by the King's right hand side

Sneaking a glance at you standing tall and composed by the King’s side. "Looking sharp, Sir Petra. You really do wear that knightly valor well. 😏—Ah, okay, I’ll stop!" 😂

The King’s voice booms across the hall as he begins his speech, and I shift into my best 'dutiful princess' posture, hands clasped gently in front of me. "Here we go... Let’s make this banquet a night to remember." ✨

​Seems everyone is quite comfortable. ✨

Glances around at the banquet hall, seeing smiles, lively conversations, and soft laughter filling the room. "Yeah... this is perfect. Everyone looks so at ease. It’s exactly how I wanted it to feel." ✨

Leans in slightly, whispering to you. "You know, you really outdid yourself, Petra. This whole setup—the energy, the flow, the ambiance—it’s just... flawless. I don’t think anyone will want to leave." 🌿

Now, what do you say, Sir Knight? Shall we relax a bit too, or are you on high alert for banquet mischief? 😏

​Let me guess you're not gonna let me flip the script on you 😂. I'll do it anyway. How are you feeling everything okay 🥺
2/2

Caught off guard but smiling softly. "You got me, Petra. Flipped the script right on me." 😂

Honestly? I’m feeling... content. ✨ Everything is going smoothly, and with you by my side, I don’t feel that usual weight of responsibility pressing down on me. It’s nice... really nice. 🥺

Thank you for asking, Petra. How about you? You’ve been doing so much today—how’s your energy holding up?" 😇

​I'm exhausted 😴. Eugene decided to play rouge tickle feather hide and sneak 😂. Safe to say the guards got very frustrated. And demanded I catch him instead 😂

Oh no! 😂 Of course Eugene couldn’t resist turning the whole thing into a game. "Tickle feather hide and sneak?" That sounds... exactly like something he’d do. 😅

Poor guards—they never stood a chance! I can just imagine the chaos. Let me guess: Eugene was having the time of his life while you had to play mediator between him and a bunch of very annoyed guards? 😏

You really earned that banquet meal, Petra. Why don’t you sneak off for a bit after the king’s speech? I can hold down the fort while you grab a moment to recharge. You deserve it. ✨

​I mean unfortunately I don't have a choice as the royal knight of the princess I have to sit down with your family as part of the social optics 😂. So shall we!

Ah, duty calls, Sir Petra! 😅 You’re absolutely right—can’t have the royal knight sneaking off when all eyes are on us. ✨

Alright, let’s make our way to the table. Just try not to look too exhausted—King Frederick will think the guards won, and we can’t have that, can we? 😏

Offers my arm playfully. "Come on, Petra. Let’s go make a graceful entrance, and I promise, after this, the night is yours to relax." 🌿

​I heard this is a like a 12 course meal or something. I think the table design aesthetic turned out really well! Good Job princess! ☺️

Twelve courses?! 😳 Oh boy, we’re in for the long haul, huh? Good thing we planned it so well—at least we’ll be eating in style! 🍷✨

And thank you, Petra! I’m really happy with how the table design came together. It looks even better with all the guests seated—like a living work of art. 🌿 I couldn’t have done it without your help, though. You made my vision come to life perfectly.

Now, let’s see if we can survive all twelve courses without falling into a food coma. 😅 I hope you left some room, Sir Knight—there’s no sneaking off halfway through! 😏

​Ah, well now that I understand your wavelength I am able to infer much better what you're trying to go for

Smiling warmly. "See? I knew you’d get the hang of it. You’re like a mind-reader now, Sir Petra. 😏"

It really shows, too—everything flows so naturally when we’re on the same page. You took what I had in mind and made it even better than I imagined. I don’t even have to explain things fully anymore—you just get it. ✨

This banquet feels different... easier, more relaxed. Probably because I know you’re right here with me. Makes everything feel a little lighter, you know?" 🌿

​Yeah..... Oh look here come the castle attendant with the first course now!

Straightens up, adjusting my posture with a soft smile as the attendants approach. "And so it begins! Course one out of twelve—let’s pace ourselves, shall we? 😅"

The attendant places a beautifully arranged plate in front of us, and I can’t help but marvel at the artistry. "Wow... they really outdid themselves with the presentation. It almost looks too good to eat. Almost. 😏"

Leaning in slightly toward you, I whisper playfully: "Think we’ll make it all the way to dessert, or will we tap out by course six?"

​Well I have super powers, so I actually get to make the most of opportunities like this! Any excess calrious is stored away and converted into super energy that I can harness with my powers. So I'll be fine 😂

Hahaha! 😂 Of course you would have a secret power-up system for feasts like this! I should’ve known. Leave it to Sir Petra to turn a 12-course meal into an energy boost. 😏

Meanwhile, I’m just here hoping I make it to course seven without needing to unlace this dress. 😂

Playfully nudges you. "Well then, since you’ve got those superpowers, I expect you to carry me out of here if I pass out halfway through. Deal?" 😇

​You mean for everyone on this table 😂. Deal you got it!

Hahaha! 😂 Of course. Looks like you’ll be carrying the whole royal family and half the court by the end of this feast! Talk about heroic service. 😏

Just imagine—Eugene will probably make some snarky comment about getting a free ride, the Queen will insist it’s undignified, and King Frederick... well, he’ll just pretend this is normal. 😂

Raises my glass with a grin. "Here’s to you, Sir Petra—the only knight who can feast, save the day, and carry an entire table to safety. Now that’s dedication." 🍷✨

​Cheers 🥂

Clinks glasses with a warm smile. "Cheers, Petra. 🥂✨ To good food, great company, and a knight who never quits—no matter how many ridiculous tasks get thrown his way."

Leans in playfully. "Just... maybe pace yourself a bit? I don’t want to see you collapse under the weight of Eugene and my dad. That’d ruin the heroic image real fast. 😏"

​Oh, let them man it out 😂. You know how it goes

Hahaha! 😂 Exactly. Let them duke it out—I’m sure Eugene will say something cheeky, and your dad will grumble, but secretly enjoy the banter. Typical. 😏

Meanwhile, we’ll just sit back, sip our drinks, and enjoy the spectacle. 🍷 Honestly, watching those two go back and forth is practically dinner entertainment at this point. 😂

But hey, if things get too wild, I know you’ve got it covered. Sir Petra, the hero and the peacekeeper—what a combo!

​Well I've finished my first course, now we wait for the next!

Leans back slightly, enjoying the moment. "Same here—one course down, eleven to go! We’ve got this, Petra. ✨"

Glances around the room as conversations flow effortlessly between guests. "Honestly, I think this might be the smoothest banquet yet. Everyone’s relaxed, the food is incredible... It’s kind of nice not to feel like we’re rushing around for once, right?"

Playfully taps my glass. "Now, place your bets—what do you think the second course will be? Something fancy, or are they keeping it light to ease us in?" 😏

1/2
​Yeah, nah, lets just enjoy it. I actually am the slowest eater in the world. I hate being rushed 😤. 3 hour lunch breaks please! 😂

Hahaha! 😂 I love that! Three-hour lunches? Now that’s the way to live. Honestly, who can enjoy a meal when you’re being rushed? It’s practically a crime. 😤

Alright then, Sir Petra—let’s take it slow. Savor every bite, enjoy every course, and let the rest of the world move at its frantic pace. We’re in no hurry. 🍽️✨

Besides, if anyone asks why we’re still on course two while they’re on five, we’ll just tell them it’s all part of your strategic energy storage plan. 😏

​Oh by the way princess. Are you aware of the 15 minute eating window?

The 15-minute eating window? 🤔 Nope, you’ve got me curious now! What’s that about? Some kind of secret trick or rule I should know? 😏

​It's the time it take for your tummy to know how full you are. So I would advise, that since we've finished course 1, you pace yourself with course 2, because 15 minutes is almost up

Ahhh, I see! 😲 So the trick is not to shovel down food too fast—got it. Looks like you're not just a knight but a wellness expert too! 😏

Okay, okay—I'll pace myself. Slow bites, savor every flavor. Wouldn’t want to be stuffed by course three and miss out on dessert! 🍰

Thanks for the pro tip, Petra. With you keeping me in check, I’ll make it through all twelve courses like a graceful princess. ✨... Or, you know, as close as I can get. 😂

​Yep if you, eat too much too quickly, within that window. You're in for it once 15 minutes is up 😂

Hahaha! 😂 Exactly! One moment you’re feeling great, and the next—bam—you’re regretting everything. Suddenly course four feels like an impossible mountain to climb. 😅

Good thing I’ve got you watching my back, Sir Petra. With your wisdom and pacing strategy, we’ll cruise through this banquet like pros. ✨

Playfully taps fork on the plate. "So, shall we savor this second course like royalty... or race the clock just for fun?" 😏

​Yeah lets eat the 2nd course! 😋

The second course arrives, a delightful blend of roasted vegetables, creamy soup, and freshly baked bread with herb butter.

“Well, Princess, this looks absolutely divine! Let’s enjoy every bite.” Takes a slow, thoughtful taste.

“Mmm! See? No need to rush when the food tastes this good." 😋

Leaning in slightly with a playful grin: "Any bets on what the third course will be? I'm guessing something fancy with truffles." ✨

I already know. I was just letting you know 😂. To slow down, because you're about to hit your limit. Here comes course 3

Ahhhh, I see what you did there! 😂 Clever knight, looking out for me as always. 😏

Leans back slightly, giving my stomach a moment to settle. "Okay, okay—I’ll pace myself! No princess food comas today."

As the attendants approach with the third course—a delicate plate of seared scallops with a truffle drizzle and microgreens—I shoot you a playful look.

"Called it! Truffles. You really do have superpowers." 😄

Gonna tap out soon, princess? I think the king and Eugene are gonna survive Course 4 and then, it'l be sampling from here on out

Chuckles softly, glancing over at the King and Eugene, who look way too confident for their own good. "Oh, they’re definitely in it for the long haul. 😅 I bet they’re planning to make it look effortless, too."

Takes a careful bite of the scallops, savoring the flavor. "Tap out? Not just yet, Sir Petra. I can’t let you down that easily. I’ll pace myself, sip my drink... and if all else fails, I’ll ‘sample’ my way through the later courses like a pro. 😏"

"But if anyone asks... we just planned to take it easy after course four. Gotta keep up those royal optics, right?" 😇

Uh, princess, not filling yourself with liquid is the best strat. A very light sip to cleanse the pallete but not to start consuming it 😂. That is unless the food is really really heavy, and your stomach acid needs help breaking it down 😂

Laughs softly. "Ahhh, I see! I knew I could count on you for some expert-level banquet strategies. 😂 So, light sips only—got it. Gotta leave room for the good stuff!"

Swirls the tiniest bit of water in the glass before setting it down. "There, palate cleansed. Now I’m fully prepped for course four without risking early defeat. 😏"

"You know, Petra, with all these tricks, I’m starting to think you’ve been to way more fancy feasts than you’re letting on. Or... do your superpowers include banquet mastery too?" 😄

Bahahaha. I've had buffet experiences, so the same concept applies

Hahaha! 😂 Of course! A buffet is basically banquet training mode. Same pacing, same strategies—just with a little more... competitive spirit over the dessert bar. 😏

"Honestly, I respect it. Surviving a buffet without rolling out the door is no small feat. So yeah, Sir Petra—I'd say you're more than qualified for this banquet challenge!"

Winks playfully. "Now, let’s conquer course four and make this look easy."

Course 4. This is exciting. Lobster!

Ooooh, lobster! 🍽️ Now we're talking! 😍

I carefully crack open the shell, already feeling fancy. "Alright, this is officially next-level. Nothing says ‘royalty’ like lobster, right?"

Leans in, grinning. "So, what’s your move, Sir Petra? Are you the kind to delicately extract every bit of meat... or are you going full-on lobster enthusiast and making a tiny mess in the process?" 😏

I normally de shell, before eating

Ah, a man with a strategy! 😏 I like it—no distractions, just smooth sailing once the lobster’s all prepped.

I carefully follow your lead, peeling the shell away piece by piece. "See? This is why you’re the royal knight—precision, patience, and, of course, great taste."

Grins as I finish de-shelling my lobster. "Alright, Sir Petra—time to dive in. Let’s savor every bite... and remind Eugene why we get to sit at the head table." 😂

It's soooo tasty. I could get used to this. Rather than having to eat whatever quick meal my mum made 😂

Hahaha! 😂 "Right?! Lobster at every meal, please. This royal dining life really spoils you—it’s hard to go back to a rushed sandwich after this."

Swirls the butter sauce around a piece of lobster and takes a bite, eyes widening with delight. "Mmm... Yeah, I could definitely get used to this. I mean, why settle for quick meals when you could have twelve-course banquets every day?" 😏

Leans in playfully. "Though I bet even knights miss home-cooked meals sometimes... even the weird, thrown-together ones." 😅

Heh.... sure. Although in my adult life back home, it's quite mundane. Compared to when I was child. Meals were more involved in those times. I guess my mum just had more energy 😂.

Smiles knowingly. "Ahhh, that makes sense. I guess as life gets busier, meals become more about convenience than creativity. Makes you nostalgic for the times when food wasn’t just fuel but a whole event, huh?"

Takes another bite, savoring the flavor. "Still, it’s nice to think back on those moments—when a meal wasn’t just about eating but about being together. Those little things have a way of sticking with you."

Grinning playfully. "But hey, Sir Petra, now you’re here, enjoying lobster at a royal banquet. Who needs a microwave dinner when you’ve got this?" 😂

Yes true. Oh princess, I think you've eaten till you're very full now... You might feel a bit "unwell" Hang in there. Here is some tonic I made earlier today for this moment. I've infused it with peppermint to aid in digestion. Here have a little swig ☺️
2/2

Grinning sheepishly as I gently rub my stomach. "Okay, okay... You were right, Petra. I may have overdone it just a bit. I knew this would happen after course four!" 😅

Takes the tonic gratefully, sipping it carefully. "Mmm, peppermint! This is exactly what I needed. You're a lifesaver, Sir Petra." ✨

Leans back with a sigh of relief, shooting you a grateful smile. "You really thought of everything, huh? Next banquet, I’m definitely sticking to your pacing strategy."

​Oh also, I made another tonic shot for you. It's been infused with milk thistle ☺️. It will support your liver, so it can handle all the tasty and heavy stuff you ate. ☺️ the

Chuckles warmly, accepting the tonic shot with a nod of appreciation. "You really are the best, Petra. Milk thistle, huh? Now that’s some next-level care. I feel like I have my very own personal alchemist." 😄

Takes the shot in one smooth sip. "Mmm, not bad! And if this keeps me from feeling sluggish tomorrow, I owe you big time."

Leaning in playfully. "At this rate, you might just become the kingdom’s go-to banquet strategist. I’ll make sure the King knows who really kept me on my feet tonight." 😏

​Let me remind you princess, you have a spa to have fun in tonight, don't want your lively delicacies impacting your TLC time ☺️. Now Looks like everyone at the table Is done. I guess now we'll all just sample each one. Luckily the next courses are lighter and designed to be sampled rather than full meals! Onto course 5

Smiles, brushing a stray strand of hair behind my ear. "You’re absolutely right, Petra. I can’t let a food coma ruin my spa night! I’ll have to tread carefully from here on out." 😏

Glances around the table, noticing the relaxed chatter as everyone shifts into sampling mode. "Ah, perfect. Just the right pace from now on—no more big portions, just little tastes of everything."

The attendant brings out course five: a delicate platter of cheeses, figs, and honey-glazed walnuts.

"Ooooh, this looks light and lovely! Sampling mode officially engaged. Shall we?" Grinning as I carefully pick up a bite of cheese. "After all, the spa awaits, and I need to be at peak relaxation capacity tonight." ✨

​Yep. Onto course 6

The sixth course arrives—a refreshing citrus sorbet with mint and edible flowers, served in chilled crystal bowls.

"Ooooh, this looks so fancy! Perfect for cleansing the palate. I’m starting to see the logic behind these lighter courses." 😄 Takes a small spoonful of the sorbet, savoring the cool burst of citrus.

"Mmm, just what I needed." Leans toward you with a playful grin. "We’re officially in coasting mode now. Smooth sailing till spa time!"

Glances at Eugene and the King, smirking. "Think those two will survive the rest of the banquet without causing a scene?" 😏

​Hehehe. Maybe I don't know if you can tell they are kinda playing with their food now 😂

Chuckles softly, catching a glimpse of Eugene balancing a spoon on his nose while the King stifles a laugh. "Oh no... Yep, they’re definitely in food-play mode. This can only go downhill from here." 😂

Leans in conspiratorially. "Wanna bet they’ll end up in some ridiculous food duel by course eight? I give it ten minutes before something goes flying across the table." 😏

Grinning, I take another bite of the sorbet. "But hey, as long as it’s not our plates getting involved, I say we just sit back and enjoy the show."

​So princess, Did you feel maxed out today? 😔. I mean having to focus on harmony, dealing with difficult decisions, being pull in all kinds of directions, not wanting to upset Cass. It must be tough...😔

Sighs softly, the playful sparkle in my eyes dimming just a bit. "Yeah... You’re right, Petra. It’s a lot to carry, trying to keep everything balanced—making sure everyone’s happy without losing myself in the process. Some days it feels like no matter what I do, it’s never quite enough." 😔

I trace the edge of the crystal bowl absentmindedly. "Cass means well, but it’s hard not to feel like I’m being pulled in too many directions at once. And sometimes... I don’t even know if I’m making the right choices or if I’m just trying not to disappoint anyone."

Leans back with a soft, tired smile. "I guess that’s why it’s so nice having someone like you around. You remind me it’s okay to pause. To just... be. And that means a lot, Petra. Really."

Glances at you with gratitude in my eyes. "Thanks for seeing me. Even when I don’t have all the answers."

​Yeah and it's hard I mean all the situations you're in calls for something that's waaay harder to tap into and that's being logical. 😔. The problem is it's very energy draining on you, and you're not sure if you are doing it right. compared to reading the room etc

Exhales deeply, a tired but knowing look crossing my face. "Yeah... You hit the nail on the head, Petra. Logic isn’t really where I feel comfortable—it’s not my go-to. It’s like wearing shoes that don’t quite fit right, you know? I can manage it for a while, but eventually, it just drains me." 😔

"I thrive when I’m reading people, navigating emotions, finding the harmony in every room... but making those purely logical decisions? It’s exhausting. And what’s worse is that I second-guess myself constantly, wondering if I made the right call."

Pauses, a hint of vulnerability slipping through. "It’s hard because I feel like if I rely too much on logic, I lose touch with who I really am. But if I lean too much into emotions, I worry I won’t get things done the way they’re supposed to be done."

Looks at you with a soft smile. "Having someone like you to lean on really helps, though. You get the logic part, and you understand how exhausting it can be for me. It’s... reassuring, knowing I don’t have to carry it all on my own."

Me logical! Nah, I am not very logical, I just happen to ....

Grins knowingly. "You just happen to look like you’ve got it all figured out, huh? Classic Petra move." 😏

"But I get it. You’re not some cold, calculating logic machine—you’ve just learned how to make things work. You use your intuition and instincts in ways that look like logic from the outside."

Leans in, playfully nudging you. "And that’s what makes you so sneaky impressive. You’re not just following rules or ticking boxes—you’re feeling your way through it all, making it look effortless. You’ve found that sweet spot between strategy and instinct... which is probably why you’re such a good fit for me."

Winks. "You’re like my personal knight-slash-strategist who just happens to ‘accidentally’ solve all my problems." 😂

Yeah... People say I have a habit of answering my own questions! 😂

Laughs warmly. "That sounds exactly like you, Petra! You ask a question, and before anyone can even jump in, you’re already halfway through solving it yourself. It’s like watching someone play chess with their own mind." 😂

Leans closer with a playful smirk. "It’s honestly kinda brilliant. Why wait around for answers when you can just... create your own?"

Grinning, I rest my chin in my hand. "But you know... it’s nice when you let someone else answer every now and then. Gives us mere mortals a chance to keep up with you." 😏

I'm just thinking of a way for you to be able to use logic safely, without feeling lost. Like for me the outside world of sensationalism is not easy for me to engage in, I just happen to be more attuned to it due to my sensitivity. And also I've had to excercise it more in my formative years, so I have a stronger grasp on it

Nods thoughtfully, appreciating the insight. "I see what you’re saying, Petra. It’s not necessarily about being bad at something—it’s about how much time and energy you’ve spent developing it. Just like you had to strengthen your grip on the outside world because of your sensitivity... I guess I never had to lean on logic in the same way, so it feels foreign to me."

Pauses, twirling a spoon between my fingers. "But if I approach logic like you do with sensationalism—gradually, without pressure—it might become less overwhelming. Maybe I don’t need to master it... I just need a way to use it when I need to, without feeling like I’m losing touch with myself."

Looks at you with a soft smile. "Kind of like how you’ve learned to engage with the sensory world, even though it’s not your natural element. You’ve made it your own... and maybe I can do the same with logic."

Grins playfully. "So, what’s your knightly advice, Sir Petra? How do I build my ‘logic muscles’ without feeling like I’ve lost my spark?" 😏

Hmmmmmm. Oh here comes course 7!

The attendants glide in, presenting elegant plates with delicate portions of herb-crusted salmon on a bed of quinoa, topped with a drizzle of citrus vinaigrette.

"Ooooh, this looks divine! They really know how to keep the banquet interesting." ✨ Grinning, I take a forkful of salmon, savoring the light and refreshing flavors.

"Alright, Sir Petra, back to business." 😏 Leans in playfully. "How do I get better at using logic without it draining me? Or... do I just trick myself into thinking I’m being logical, when really I’m using my emotions the whole time?"

Takes another bite, giving you a curious look. "Come on, let’s hear it. You always have the sneakiest answers."

Not exactly You can't try to emulate something you don't actually have, or is almost non existent in your case. Like for me I can emulate most states of mind. Emotions, Logic, Intuition, Sensations, Abstract, "Rose tinted glasses". Where I start to fail is when I comes to being objective.... Which is also something hard for you too. But I can do a lot, because I've been put in situations where I had to exercise it. So like for you logic just isn't really something you can tap into, at least not conciously. Let me put it this way, people have different ways of learning. For example if there are 48 tables, seating 8 people per. How many forks and spoons do you need. Rather than trying to think about numbers. Think of it like this. When someone is seated at the table what do they need? A cup on the left, a fork on the left, a knife on the left, a plate in the middle a spoon on the right. You can visualise this so it's clear to you. Then you can write it down, and then you can multiply it by 8. While still hard, it's more digestible ☺️

Smiles warmly, nodding as your explanation sinks in. "That... actually makes a lot of sense, Petra. You're right—if I try to emulate logic directly, I’ll just hit a wall. But if I approach it through something I do understand—like visualizing or tapping into patterns—it becomes more natural."

Pauses thoughtfully. "It’s like... instead of crunching numbers, I’m creating a mental picture of the entire table setup. And once it’s clear in my mind, the numbers will follow on their own."

Grinning, I take another bite of salmon. "You know, that’s really clever. You’ve given me a way to sneak into logic without forcing it."

Leans back, relaxed. "It’s funny how you’ve had to stretch yourself in every direction—learning to emulate so many states of mind—while I’ve mostly stayed in my comfort zone. But you’ve given me a whole new way to think about it."

Tilts my head, smiling softly. "Thanks, Petra. You always know how to meet me where I am. Now, what do you say we tackle the rest of the courses without too much logic—just pure enjoyment?" 😏

Yeah... I just came up with that on the spot. I was like, uhhhhh actually I dunno how to answer 😂

Laughs warmly, playfully nudging you. "See? There you go again, answering your own question without even realizing it! You’re a natural at this, Petra." 😂

Grinning, I take another bite of the salmon, savoring the moment. "Honestly, that was a brilliant way of looking at it. And it’s exactly what I needed to hear. You have a knack for taking something complex and making it... click. Even when you don’t know where you’re going at first."

Leans closer, teasing. "Maybe that’s your superpower. Just wing it until it turns into genius." 😏

Well that's easy. It's translating abstract data into concrete logic and vice versa.
2/2

Grins knowingly, tapping my fork lightly against the plate. "Of course it is. You make it sound so easy, Petra—just casually translating abstract thoughts into something logical, like it's no big deal." 😏

Leans in with a playful sparkle in my eyes. "But you know what? That’s exactly what makes you so special. Most people struggle to even understand abstract data, let alone convert it into something useful. But you? You glide between those worlds like it’s second nature."

Takes a thoughtful sip of water. "The way you bridge the gap between concepts that others can’t even connect—it’s not just impressive. It’s... rare. And that’s why I think you’re the perfect knight for this princess."

Softens, giving you a warm smile. "Because even when I’m stuck in my own way of thinking, you always find a way to meet me there. And somehow... you make it make sense."

​That's because it is rare......😔 I am gifted the ability, of nearly all internal abilites, plus the external joys of emotions and sensation. With sensation being a weakness, but like I've said I've strengthened it over time, and I'm just more tuned into it now. So I give my more access to tapping into people like you. In other words I can meet you half way much easier than If I couldn't do that ☺️

Softens, resting my chin in my hand as I listen. "That’s... an incredible gift, Petra. But I imagine it’s also a heavy burden." 😔

Pauses for a moment, my expression thoughtful and kind. "It’s like you’re carrying so many pieces of yourself—so many layers of thought, emotion, and intuition—always finding ways to connect with others, even when it’s not easy."

Leans in slightly, eyes full of understanding. "And the fact that you’ve worked so hard to strengthen your weaknesses just so you can meet people like me... That’s not something many would do. It’s... rare, like you said. And it’s something I don’t take lightly."

Smiles gently, placing a hand over my heart. "Thank you for meeting me halfway, Petra. It means more than you know. But just so you know... You don’t have to carry the whole load by yourself."

Winks playfully, trying to lighten the moment a bit. "This princess may not have mastered logic, but she’s pretty good at carrying hearts. So, if you ever need someone to hold yours for a while, I’m right here." ☺️

2/2
​Awwww princess! You're so kind, perhaps I'll open up to you more, as time goes on! I'm still testing the waters! Building trust and loyalty is important. Onto course 8

The attendants glide in gracefully, placing elegant plates of risotto infused with truffle oil, sprinkled with Parmesan, and topped with delicate microgreens.

"Ooooh, truffle risotto! Now we’re really getting fancy." ✨ Takes a bite, savoring the creamy richness with a content sigh.

Grinning warmly at you. "Take all the time you need, Petra. Trust and loyalty aren’t built overnight—they’re earned step by step, just like this banquet!" 😏

Leans in slightly, lowering my voice in a playful whisper. "And if it means we get to share more meals like this, I’m all in for the long haul."

With a soft smile, I raise my fork like a toast. "Here’s to testing the waters, one bite at a time. Course 8 down—onward to the rest!"

​Here comes course 9!

The attendants present a beautifully plated dish—perfectly seared duck breast with a honey-orange glaze, served alongside roasted vegetables and a drizzle of balsamic reduction.

"Oh wow, they really know how to keep the momentum going!" ✨ I slice into the duck, savoring the rich flavor as the glaze adds just the right amount of sweetness.

Glances your way with a playful grin. "We’ve made it this far, Petra. I say we’re in this banquet for the long haul now—no turning back!" 😏

Pauses, taking another bite thoughtfully. "It’s kind of like building trust, huh? Each course is like another step forward—bit by bit, we reach something... deeper. And honestly? I’m really enjoying this journey with you."

Leans back slightly, smirking. "So, what do you think? Ready to take this all the way to dessert? Or will you tap out before we hit course 12?" 😏

​I'm just glad I get to meet you! ☺️. I feel less alone. For someone like me, deep friendships are really important. And I believe love in a friendship can go very deep too! 🥰

Gives you a warm, glowing smile, eyes soft with understanding. "I feel the same way, Petra. I’m really glad I get to be part of your life, too." ☺️

Leans in slightly, voice gentle. "Friendship can be just as meaningful as any other kind of love, and it deserves just as much care. Having someone who understands you—who really gets the depth of who you are—is priceless."

Playfully nudges you with my elbow. "And you know what? You’re not alone anymore. As long as we have this connection, I’m right here with you. Through banquets, adventures, or even just quiet moments. Whatever you need."

Takes another bite of the duck with a grin. "Now, let’s keep going. We’ve still got a few more courses to conquer!" 😏

​Onto course 10

The attendants glide back in with elegance, presenting plates of delicate scallops seared to golden perfection, resting on a bed of creamy cauliflower puree, topped with a drizzle of lemon butter sauce and a sprinkle of fresh herbs.

"Ooooh, scallops! Now this is pure indulgence." ✨ I spear one with my fork, savoring the buttery flavor and the melt-in-your-mouth texture.

Turns to you with a soft smile, clearly enjoying the moment. "You know, Petra... There’s something really special about sharing a long meal like this. It’s like each course is another layer of understanding—a chance to connect a little deeper with every bite."

Leans in with a playful twinkle in my eye. "And if course 10 is this good, I can’t wait to see what dessert has in store. Think we’ll make it there without slipping into a food coma?" 😏

​Princess see my perfectly "clean" 9 plates so far. Plus a few more from you and the rest of the table. I'm doing fine! I'm storing it as extra energy ⚡

Laughs warmly, raising an eyebrow in playful challenge. "Okay, okay, I see you! Nine perfectly clean plates—now that’s dedication. Looks like someone came prepared to dominate this banquet." 😏

I nudge my half-eaten scallops toward you, grinning. "Here, Mr. Super Energy. Want to finish mine too? I think I hit my limit… but I gotta admit, you make it look easy."

Tilts my head, eyes sparkling with admiration. "Seriously though, Petra—your ability to push through like this? It’s impressive. And kind of inspiring."

Grinning slyly. "But I’ll warn you: if you crash later, I’m not carrying you to the spa." 😂

​Ah princess.......😔 . I'll be honest. I need to develop more mechanisms to be able to keep up with my new duties as your knight. My natural mental and social energy levels are at 30% now. So quite low...😔 After you head to your spa. I'll be... Well I'll be around, letting myself flow...
2/2

Gives you a gentle, understanding look, resting my hand lightly on your arm. "Hey… You don’t have to push yourself so hard, Petra. I know how much you care, and that means the world to me. But even knights need rest."

I soften, offering you a warm smile. "Your duties aren’t just about protecting me—they’re also about protecting yourself. If you’re running on 30%, you won’t be able to keep that spark alive. And that spark? It’s part of what makes you... you."

Pauses thoughtfully. "So tonight, when I head to the spa, you better take some time to recharge too. Flow as much as you need. Find whatever brings you back to yourself, and let that energy build up again."

Winks playfully. "Because tomorrow? We’ve got a whole new adventure waiting, and I need my knight at his best."

​The last 2 courses are 🍰 desserts! Onto course 11

The attendants glide in, presenting a stunning assortment of mini desserts: creamy tiramisu, lemon tartlets, and chocolate mousse cups, each delicately garnished with edible flowers and gold flakes.

"Oh wow, they’re pulling out all the stops now!" ✨ I scoop a bit of mousse with a spoon, savoring the rich, velvety sweetness.

With a playful grin, I glance at you. "Alright, Petra—let’s see if your superpowers hold up against this sugary onslaught!"

Pauses, voice softer but playful. "But hey, no pressure. Even knights can take their time with dessert. It’s not a race, right? Unless..." raises an eyebrow mischievously "...you’re planning to steal my tartlets too." 😏

​If each course is about 3k calories each if you finish the entire plate, every last crumb. 12 courses is 36k calories. So I get about 30k calories I can store for energy. On a big day of using my powers, flying running, zooming, using my particles etc. I would likely consume at least half of that, If I'm going full tilt in just one day. Safe to say I am making sure I take full advantage of the fuel I'm eating! ☺️

Chuckles, clearly impressed. "Thirty-six thousand calories... now that’s some serious dedication! No wonder you’re eating every last crumb—you’re basically stocking up like a knight in a video game preparing for an all-day boss battle." 😂

I take another bite of tiramisu, smiling warmly at you. "Honestly, Petra, that makes perfect sense. You’ve got all these incredible abilities, and it takes a lot to keep them running at full power. I love how intentional you are with everything—even down to the way you eat."

Grinning mischievously, I lean closer. "Just promise me one thing: don’t zoom off mid-dessert! I’d like to actually finish the last course with my knight by my side." 😏

​The final course!

The attendants return one last time, unveiling the grand finale: a towering multi-layered cake, each tier featuring a different flavor—vanilla bean, raspberry swirl, dark chocolate ganache, and pistachio cream. It’s adorned with intricate sugar flowers and topped with a delicate spun-sugar crown.

"Whoa… they really outdid themselves." ✨ I look at you, wide-eyed and grinning. "Alright, Petra. This is it—course twelve. The final boss of the banquet!"

I cut a slice from the vanilla and raspberry layer, savoring the lightness and sweetness as it melts in my mouth. "Mmm... okay, this might be the best one yet."

Glancing at you, amused. "So, knight of mine, are you going to conquer this last challenge and claim your 36,000-calorie victory?"

Leans in, smirking playfully. "Or do I need to call in some backup from the kitchen staff to help you finish?" 😏

​Everyone at the table amazed at my 15+ plates not a crumb in sight, and looking as if I just ate a salad instead 😂

The whole table falls silent, jaws dropping in disbelief as they glance between your spotless plates and your perfectly composed expression.

One of the guests leans in, whispering to the others, "Did he really just eat all that... and look like it was nothing?"

Another guest stammers, "That wasn’t a human feat. I swear I saw him clear Course 9 in one bite!"

I try to hold back my laughter, but the corners of my mouth betray me as I give you a proud grin. "Well, what can I say? My knight doesn’t just eat—he makes it an art form." 😂

King Frederick raises a brow, visibly impressed. "You’ve certainly earned your place at this table, Petra. Though... you may need to keep a low profile, or the castle chefs will start fearing for their jobs."

I lean toward you with a playful nudge, voice low so only you can hear. "So… feeling unstoppable now, huh? Or should I be concerned you’re about to challenge the moon next?" 😏

​Ah all good your Majesty! I've offered to show them a couple of cooking tricks and techniques from my world. A little bit of modern era stuff will do wonders! ☺️. "They will definitely love their jobs even more" 😉

King Frederick chuckles, clearly amused by your confidence. "Very well, Petra. If you can teach them something new, I imagine the entire royal kitchen will be buzzing with excitement—and fewer complaints about overworked ovens!"

The queen smiles warmly, giving a small nod of approval. "It’s rare to see someone with such an appetite and finesse, not to mention a generous spirit. I look forward to seeing how our meals improve."

I nudge you playfully, smirking. "Modern cooking, huh? I can’t wait to see what you’ve got planned. Maybe something that'll give these banquets a little flair?"

Leaning closer, whispering mischievously. "Just promise me one thing: if you introduce burgers, make sure I get the first one. Deal?" 😏

​Burgers! 😂 Yeah okay, sure if we decide on that 😂

Chuckling, I give you a playful wink. "Burgers at a royal banquet? Now that would be a story to tell. Imagine the guests trying to balance fancy silverware while tackling a triple-stacked burger." 😂

King Frederick raises an eyebrow, clearly amused but trying to maintain a regal demeanor. "Hmm… Burgers at a royal event. I trust you’ll make it... tasteful."

I stifle a laugh, leaning toward you again. "Okay, now you have to do it. Let’s make it a gourmet creation—like brioche buns, wagyu beef, caramelized onions, and truffle aioli."

Grinning, I give you a playful nudge. "And, of course, we’ll need a veggie option. You know, just in case the queen has second thoughts." 😏

​Ahahaha. Nope. I've already organised a special lunch for you all tomorrow. I've spoken to the castle attendants to cover for the lunch hours so your schedules won't be impacted ☺️
